name: clearborder
description: ClearBorder — an AI agent team that replaces the customs broker: it calls the supplier with live translation, remembers everything in a persistent CaseFile, drives the customs portal with Computer Use, and pauses for one human approval before submitting.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,portal,office,console -c cyan,yellow,magenta,green --kill-others "pnpm --filter @clearborder/server dev" "pnpm --filter @clearborder/portal dev" "pnpm --filter @clearborder/office dev" "pnpm --filter @clearborder/console dev"
scripts.demo:live: concurrently -n server,portal,office -c cyan,yellow,magenta --kill-others "DEMO_MODE=false COMPUTER_USE_MODE=live pnpm --filter @clearborder/server dev" "pnpm --filter @clearborder/portal dev" "pnpm --filter @clearborder/office dev"
